description: Return a point-in-time snapshot of resource consumption for each quota dimension for a tenant. For each dimension, counts are queried from the relevant provisioning table. Dimensions without a registered query mapping return usageStatus=unknown. usageStatus is computed server-side against the tenant effective limit so the console can render status without a second entitlements call.

tenantId.description: Target tenant identifier. Tenant owner may only request their own.

usageStatus.description: approaching_limit: 80-99% of effective limit; at_limit: exactly 100%; over_limit: exceeds effective limit

usageUnknownReason.description: Present when usageStatus=unknown. Values: CONSUMPTION_QUERY_FAILED, NO_QUERY_MAPPING

errors.description: Actor cannot read consumption for that tenant
